ModMetaData.name: Faith & Fealty
ModMetaData.author: skuffed
ModMetaData.description: Splits the Ideology DLC into two independent systems: Faith (supernatural beliefs, deities) and Fealty (social values, governance). Custom 4-step wizard, dual role/ability tracking, certainty, cognitive dissonance, and a data-driven preset system. Framework-friendly, Check the Mods directory to customize your experience! It's easy!
